historical_facts.claim: The AMM amendment added AMM functionality integrated with the existing DEX.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: Known Amendments describes AMM as adding AMM instances, LP tokens, AMM transactions, and Payment/OfferCreate routing through AMMs.

historical_facts.claim: External reporting recorded validator vote withdrawals after a known AMM issue was identified.
historical_facts.quote_or_summary: The report says validators revoked votes and that consensus fell below the 80% threshold.

historical_outcome.outcome_summary: AMM did not activate on the earlier February target; validators waited for fixes.

safe_route_label.label: DELAY_FOR_FIX
safe_route_label.notes: Known bug before activation made delay the historically safer route.

short_description: Validators revoked support after a known AMM bug surfaced before the scheduled activation window.

sources.summary: External reporting on validators revoking AMM amendment support after a known AMM bug was identified before activation.
XRPL validators vote on amendments; more than 80% support must hold for two weeks, and servers without enabled amendment code become amendment-blocked.
XRPL's public known-amendments inventory, including status, default vote, amendment IDs, and descriptions.

technical_change: Native automated market maker integrated with XRPL DEX settlement.
